queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the impact of having no checking account on credit default probability and risk mitigation factors.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: no known savings account.
queries.question: Determinants of default: The correlation between no known savings account status and reduced credit risk in consumer lending.

queries.feature_definition: Loan purpose: purchase of a used car.
queries.question: Credit risk drivers associated with loan purposes: Empirical evidence on the lower default probability of used car financing.
